body:
## Problem

**Verified SEO bug affecting ~40 drummer pages with extended bios.**

`packages/frontend/App.js:11855` sets `document.title = bio.metaTitle` when a drummer page renders with an extended bio. Every `extendedBios.js` entry has a `metaTitle` in the format:

```
'Ben Koller Biography - Converge Drummer & Hardcore Legend | MetalForge'
'Inferno Biography - Behemoth Drummer & Extreme Metal Powerhouse | MetalForge'
'Lars Ulrich Biography - Metallica Drummer, Gear & Career | MetalForge'
```

**The SSR meta handler** (`api/meta/[...path].js:621`) correctly emits `"${name} Drum Kit & Gear Setup | MetalForge"` (from the #1158 template fix). But **when Googlebot executes JavaScript**, the React hydration overwrites this with the "Biography" title from `extendedBios.js`.

## GSC Evidence

| Drummer | Query | Pos | CTR |
|---|---|---|---|
| Ben Koller | ben koller drum setup | 3.3 | **0%** |
| Inferno | behemoth drum kit | 9.0 | **0%** |

Position 3.3 with **0% CTR** = perfect signal of title mismatch. The user sees "Ben Koller Biography" in SERP but searched for "drum setup".

## Scope

~40 drummers with custom extendedBios.js entries all have this pattern. Every entry has `metaTitle: '[Name] Biography - [Band] Drummer ...`.

## Fix

Update all `metaTitle` values in `packages/frontend/data/extendedBios.js` from the "Biography" pattern to the keyword-matched pattern:

| Before | After |
|---|---|
| `[Name] Biography - [Band] Drummer ... \| MetalForge` | `[Name] Drum Kit & Gear Setup — [Band] Drummer \| MetalForge` |

**Key GSC-grounded examples to fix first:**
- Line 3139: Ben Koller → "Ben Koller Drum Kit & Gear Setup — Converge Drummer | MetalForge"
- Line 5914: Inferno → "Inferno Drum Kit & Gear Setup — Behemoth Drummer | MetalForge"
- Line 15: Lars Ulrich → "Lars Ulrich Drum Kit & Gear Setup — Metallica Drummer | MetalForge"

Apply the same pattern to all ~40 entries.

## Files to Touch

- `packages/frontend/data/extendedBios.js` — all `metaTitle:` values (~40 lines)

## Quality Gate

- Grep for "Biography" in extendedBios.js metaTitle fields → should return 0
- Grep for "Drum Kit & Gear Setup" → should match every metaTitle
- Verify a few title lengths stay under 60 chars

## Estimated Organic Uplift

Fixes pos 3.3 "ben koller drum setup" from 0% → expected 15%+ CTR. Compounds across all ~40 extended-bio drummers. Same lever that drives Matt Greiner 20% CTR (his title already contains "Drum Kit").

Serves: the entire "[drummer] drum kit / drum setup" GSC query cluster.

## Done

- [ ] All extendedBios.js metaTitle values updated to "Drum Kit & Gear Setup" format
- [ ] No remaining "Biography" in metaTitle fields
- [ ] Titles remain under 60 characters
title: SEO batch: extendedBios.js metaTitle overrides — all ~40 'Biography' titles override SSR with non-keyword title (client-side JS replaces good SSR title)
